docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT WOODSON, OCELIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT WOODSON, OCELIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WOODSON, OCELIA
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT WOODSON, OCELIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT WOODSON, OCELIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT WOODSON, OCELIA
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-28-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-23-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: EWUSI-MENSAH, MAAME A.F. SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR WOODSON, OCELIA
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT WOODSON, OCELIA
ORDER SHORTENING TIME RE: MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER FILED BY DEFT.

TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE; DECLARATIONS OF OCELIA WOODSON AND MAAME A.F. EWUSI-MENSAH, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT WOODSON, OCELIA HEARING SET FOR JUN-24-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-23-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE NOT SETTLED. TRIAL DATE MAINTAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM SCOTT WEAVER, CLERK KAY PEEK, NOT REPORTED (206)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER FILED BY DEFT.
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT OCELIA WOODSON'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE.

JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO, CLERKS DIANNE BOFFI, VERA MU, REPORTER JOANN BRYCE. MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-24-2004 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT OCELIA WOODSON'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED FROM 6/28/04 TO 7/26/04 IN DEPT. 206 @ 9:00AM. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. NO NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET. ORDER SIGNED.
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-28-2004 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON JUL-26-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT WOODSON, OCELIA
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-26-2004 PER PLTF'S ATTY'S REQUEST TO COURT CLERK - CASE SETTLED.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KARAYEL, SUZAN SUBSTITUTED FOR EVJE, ARNOLD WALTER AS ATTORNEY FOR SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
